caption: A technical diagram illustrating a data pipeline between "Edge" and "Cloud" environments is displayed on a screen. On the left, the "Edge" section shows three rows, each consisting of "HW / SW" connected to an "Event" box. These events feed into a large blue vertical block labeled "Log Events Collector (aggregator)." This collector then passes data to the "Cloud" section, which contains a light gray container housing a "Stream Processor" and an "Analysis" block. The "Stream Processor" sends data to a database icon and also feeds into the "Analysis" block, which in turn sends data to another database icon. A small inset video in the upper right corner shows a person with glasses wearing a pink shirt. Across the sequence of frames, the diagram and the person in the inset remain static, with no visible changes in the layout, text, or actions.
